allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:4002/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"siteId":"acme-demo","conversationId":"test-123","message":"How long does shipping take?"}')

PowerShell($ports = 4000, 4001, 4002, 5173; foreach \($p in $ports\) { $procs = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach \($pid in $procs\) { try { Stop-Process -Id $pid -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "killed PID $pid on port $p" } catch { Write-Output "could not kill PID $pid on port $p : $_" } } }; Write-Output "---"; foreach \($p in $ports\) { $still = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($still\) { Write-Output "port $p STILL in use" } else { Write-Output "port $p free" } })

PowerShell($ports = 4000, 4001, 4002, 5173; foreach \($p in $ports\) { $procs = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; foreach \($procId in $procs\) { try { Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "killed PID $procId on port $p" } catch { Write-Output "could not kill PID $procId on port $p" } } }; Write-Output "---"; foreach \($p in $ports\) { $still = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $p -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($still\) { Write-Output "port $p STILL in use" } else { Write-Output "port $p free" } })

PowerShell($path = "c:\\Users\\Harish\\Desktop\\coding\\widget_chatbot\\packages\\app"; Get-ChildItem -Path $path -Recurse -Force | Sort-Object FullName -Descending | ForEach-Object { try { Remove-Item -LiteralPath $_.FullName -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "rm $\($_.FullName\)" } catch { Write-Output "FAIL $\($_.FullName\): $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; try { Remove-Item -LiteralPath $path -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "rm packages/app DIR" } catch { Write-Output "FAIL dir: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($path = "c:\\Users\\Harish\\Desktop\\coding\\widget_chatbot\\packages\\app"; Write-Output "Exists: $\(Test-Path $path\)"; Write-Output "Contents:"; Get-ChildItem -Path $path -Force -ErrorAction Continue | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "  $\($_.FullName\)" }; Write-Output "---"; Write-Output "Try via cmd rmdir:"; cmd /c "rmdir /S /Q `"$path`" 2>&1"; Write-Output "After: Exists = $\(Test-Path $path\)")

PowerShell(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, StartTime, @{N='CmdLine';E={\(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($_.Id\)"\).CommandLine}} | Format-List)
